recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo on Zombie Island
recommendations.overview: After going their separate ways, Scooby-Doo, Shaggy, Velma, Daphne, and Fred reunite to investigate the ghost of Moonscar the pirate on a haunted bayou island, but it turns out the swashbuckler's spirit isn't the only creepy character on the island.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! Curse of the Lake Monster
recommendations.overview: Scooby-Doo and the gang are on the case when a mysterious lake monster starts scaring the guests at a summer resort in Erie Point, where Fred, Daphne, Velma and Shaggy have taken on seasonal jobs to pay for a barn they accidentally burned down. But i

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! and the Goblin King
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Animation, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Music
recommendations.overview: Scooby-Doo and Shaggy must go into the underworld ruled by The Goblin King in order to stop a mortal named The Amazing Krudsky who wants power and is a threat to their pals: Fred, Velma, and Daphne.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! The Mystery Begins
recommendations.overview: Unjustly accused of staging a spooky practical joke complete with ghosts, Daphne, Velma, Fred and Shaggy are suspended from Coolsville High. To clear their names, they team up to solve the supernatural mystery…and head straight into nonstop laughs an

recommendations.genres: Adventure, Animation, Family, Comedy, Mystery, Science Fiction

recommendations.title: Good Kids
recommendations.overview: Four high school students look to redefine themselves after graduation.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! and the Curse of the 13th Ghost

recommendations.title: Freak Show
recommendations.overview: The story of teenager Billy Bloom who, despite attending an ultra conservative high school, makes the decision to run for homecoming queen.
